rows.content: My Open Brain MCP is now connected and working — successfully integrated with Claude as of March 22, 2026.

2024 Tax Prep Notes — Hagan Family: The Prius went out of service on 7/01/2024 due to catastrophic failure (total loss). A rental vehicle was used for the remainder of the year for courier/delivery work. This affects mileage deduction calculations — need to split vehicle records at the 7/1 cutoff and account for rental vehicle expenses for July-December 2024. The previously prepared (but not filed) return should reflect this vehicle change. Also may trigger a casualty loss deduction depending on insurance recovery. Check prior session's unfiled return for details on how the rental vehicle was handled.

action_items: Split vehicle records at the 7/1 cutoff.
Account for rental vehicle expenses for July-December 2024.
Check prior session's unfiled return for details on the rental vehicle.

rows.content:

1. Danelle's Amazon 1099 is unavailable — will need to extract/reconstruct Amazon income from IRS account transcripts or other sources
2. Mileage will be reconstructed as in prior years (same methodology)
3. Rental vehicle (Hertz) cost estimate: $300/week from 7/1/2024 through end of year (~26 weeks = ~$7,800). Derek will get exact documentation later — filing now for compliance, amendment expected later with exact figures.
4. IRS account transcripts for 2024 have been loaded into the folder
5. Uber miles for 2024 = 17,326
6. This is a "file to be compliant" return — amendment will follow with exact rental documentation
